asset_name: Tirzepatide Safety, Contraindication and Living Evidence Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_grade: A1/B1 — current label plus primary clinical evidence
controlled_conclusion: Current label controls include thyroid C-cell tumour warning, severe gastrointestinal reactions, acute kidney injury from volume depletion, gallbladder disease, pancreatitis, hypersensitivity, hypoglycaemia with relevant concomitant medicines, diabetic-retinopathy complications, pregnancy risk and pulmonary aspiration during anaesthesia or deep sedation.

sources.title: ZEPBOUND current United States prescribing information
MOUNJARO current United States prescribing information
Tirzepatide once weekly for the treatment of obesity
